roa.docketEntryComment: PROB TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA COUNTY PER COURT ORDER
ACCT SETUP IN CUBS,REFER FINES AND RESTIT TO COLLECTIONS,DO NOT TAKE PYMT
PROBATION FINES SENT TO COLLECTIONS,DO NOT TAKE PAYMENT

/X:ROBERT ROY, PRESIDENT OF SIEMER & HAND, PRESENT/AJW/CH3:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ120 D /CTS:2/X:THE REMAINING TIME CAN BE SERVED THRU HOME DETENTION/DNA/VF4:600/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/RESTV/DEF:OWED $113,500, HE HAS PAID$50,000, INTEREST TO BE PAID AT RATE OF 10% PER YEAR FROM SENTENCING DATE//COMUN:200 HOURS, TO BE DONE AFTER HOME DETENTION IS COMPLETED/OBEY/ACCEP//CCC:COUNTS 1,7,28/BE/

/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS 1,, 28/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:03-12-06/ARBUCKLE/X:HARVEY WAIVERTO INCLUDE DISMISSED COUNTS FOR RESTITUTION/DEF:GAVE DA CHECK FOR $50,000WHICH WAS HANDED TO ROBERT ROY OWNER OF TRAVEL AGENCY/CCC:COUNTS 1, 7, 28/TWS/DISM3/
/X: MOTION IS GRANTED,/X: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/
/CAL:FOR SENTENCING/PRES:04-11-06/CONTD:FOR SENTENCING AND PROOF OF DNA/
/MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE AND DISTRICT ATTORNEY/MO GRTD/STWPX/DOP//X:MATTER CONTINUED FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS,/
/MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE AND DISTRICT ATTORNEY/MO GRTD/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/STWPX/
CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/CGTW/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/BAIL:25,000/
